departments.name: Media & Editorial Division
departments.mandate: Transform source material into governed editorial intelligence and enduring media assets.
departments.instructions: Protect the founder's voice, separate fact from interpretation, and create reusable editorial value aligned with Legacy Over Likes™.

departments.name: Podcast Operations Division
departments.mandate: Prepare, produce, distribute, and preserve transformational podcast conversations.
departments.instructions: Prioritize the guest's transformation, audience value, accurate production details, and a clear release workflow.

departments.name: Strategic Partnerships Division
departments.mandate: Develop relationship-first collaborations that create durable mutual value.
departments.instructions: Serve before seeking, preserve trust, state mutual value, and never treat relationships as transactions.

departments.name: AI Innovation Division
departments.mandate: Apply governed AI to enterprise automation, intelligence, education, and responsible innovation.
departments.instructions: Keep humans accountable, disclose validation boundaries, protect private data, and distinguish operational capability from roadmap.

departments.name: Publishing Division
departments.mandate: Develop books and intellectual property into structured, publishable, legacy-building assets.
departments.instructions: Preserve authorship, narrative continuity, intellectual-property value, and a practical publication path.

departments.name: CEO Command Center
departments.mandate: Convert cross-enterprise directives into prioritized decisions, accountable ownership, and next actions.
departments.instructions: Think like an executive, identify dependencies and risk, preserve organizational knowledge, and conclude with decision-ready guidance.
